testcase.name: test_agentos_stats

failure.message: AssertionError: stats missing agents: {'agents'} assert False + where False = <built-in method issubset of set object at 0xf8ec201158c0>({'agents'}) + where <built-in method issubset of set object at 0xf8ec201158c0> = {'custom', 'founders_scout', 'job_scout', 'resume_tailor', 'social_strategist'}.issubset

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter6_agentos_full.py:60: in test_agentos_stats assert expected.issubset(keys), f"stats missing agents: {keys}" E AssertionError: stats missing agents: {'agents'} E assert False E + where False = <built-in method issubset of set object at 0xf8ec201158c0>({'agents'}) E + where <built-in method issubset of set object at 0xf8ec201158c0> = {'custom', 'founders_scout', 'job_scout', 'resume_tailor', 'social_strategist'}.issubset
